about.title: About Us
story: Rosella started from a personal experience before becoming a brand.
As a pharmacist, I struggled with dry, sensitive skin and recurring eczema. Even though I used cold cream, I felt I needed more than just a protective layer on the skin's surface.

This drove me to research, learn, and experiment on my own. I started with natural ingredients like lanolin, honey, and cocoa butter, then kept refining the formula until I reached a blend that combined hydration, comfort, and the texture I was looking for.
After many trials and improvements, Rosella Cream was born.
Rosella was designed to provide gentle care for dry and sensitive skin, focusing on supporting the skin barrier and delivering comfortable hydration without a greasy feel or added fragrances.
What started as an attempt to solve a problem I lived with every day has now become a product I'm proud to share with everyone who struggles with dryness and sensitivity.
